footnotes.text: Word spoken by angels: the Mosaic Law. Proved to be valid: or, "held good," "had the force of law." Just punishment: literally, "just recompense of reward"
World to come: here means the Christian dispensation, not the future life. 6-8: Ps. 8, 5-8.
All from one: probably, from one family, with God as the Father of all.
